# PDF.js (vendored)

Files: `pdf.min.js`, `pdf.worker.min.js` — Mozilla PDF.js v3.11.174.
License: Apache License 2.0 — https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js/blob/master/LICENSE

Vendored so `Apex_Title_Studio.html` can read dropped PDFs fully offline (no CDN).
Inlined into the app by `tools/build_studio.mjs`.
